the vast majority of the negative reviews for this game are made by literal toddlers or racists who decide that making a bad review on a game will change anything, like come on. you know exactly why you got banned, Ranting about it in the reviews wouldn’t help. now let me clarify some things:

“the moderation sucks” no it doesn’t. If you talk crap ingame what do you expect that will happen?

“I got falsely banned” once again, you did not. the moderators for this game wouldn’t ban for no reason. and you have the right to deem their actions unruly by simply heading towards the discord server and opening a ticket with a reasonable explanation as to why you should be unbanned.

“old eagler tag was better” yes but no. if the owner wanted to keep hatroom he would make this game apk method, and not unity. and he mentioned inside of the discord server that he doesn’t want to keep hatroom because it has nothing in it.

Now Stop making false reviews and accusations towards the moderators
